name: Taysha Gene Therapies, Inc.
business: Taysha Gene Therapies is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on advancing AAV-based gene therapies for the treatment of severe monogenic diseases of the central nervous system. Its lead clinical program TSHA-102 is in development for the treatment of Rett syndrome. The company does not have any product candidates approved for sale and has not generated any revenue from product sales.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on advancing AAV-based gene therapies for the treatment of severe monogenic diseases of the central nervous system, or CNS.

catalysts.event: Longer-term safety and efficacy data update from Part A REVEAL Phase 1/2 trials
catalysts.sentence: An update on longer-term safety and efficacy data from the Part A REVEAL Phase 1/2 trials is expected in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Complete dosing of all patients in REVEAL pivotal trial
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete dosing of all patients in the REVEAL pivotal trial in the second quarter of 2026.
We expect to complete dosing in the ASPIRE trial in the second quarter of 2026.
